data.title: Paysign, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results; Patient Affordability Drives 40% Revenue Growth and Significant Margin Expansion

data.title: Phreesia Named One of Becker’s Top Places to Work in Healthcare
data.description: Phreesia, an all-remote company based in Wilmington, Delaware, has been recognized as one of the top places to work in healthcare by Becker’s Healthcare for 2026. This is the second time Phreesia has received this honor. The list highlights hospitals, health systems, and healthcare organizations that prioritize their employees by offering competitive benefits, opportunities for professional growth, and fostering a supportive work environment to enhance engagement and retention. Phreesia is proud to be acknowledged for their commitment to creating a positive workplace culture.

data.title: Kitsault Energy: The Best Kept Secret of the Canadian Pacific Gateway Pipeline Advancing Crude Oil and NGL Exports to Asia
data.description: In Canada, Dr. Krishnan Suthanthiran has unveiled the blueprint for Kitsault Energy (KE), an energy corridor proposed to be erected north of Prince Rupert, British Columbia. The initiative seeks to link inland energy reserves to a specialized port and terminal at Kitsault, with the objective of streamlining the export process to global markets. KE's primary goal is to support the export of various valuable resources from Canada, such as vast reserves of crude oil and natural gas liquids, alongside essential commodities like potash, uranium, and canola.

data.title: Vesta Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Mexico City-based real estate company, Corporación Inmobiliaria Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX, BMV: VESTA), announced that their financial results for the First Quarter of 2026 will be revealed on Thursday, April 23, 2026, post market close. A conference call will be held to discuss these results on Friday, April 24, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time. To participate, individuals can join via webcast or by dialing in.

data.title: Compass Minerals Continues Balance Sheet Transformation and Deleveraging
data.description: Compass Minerals International, Inc. (NYSE: CMP) located in Overland Park, Kan., is expediting its balance sheet transformation and debt reduction strategy. The Company disclosed its decision to fully redeem $150 million in principal amount of its 6.750% Senior Notes due 2027. Peter Fjellman, the chief financial officer, emphasized that reducing debt is a key focus for fiscal 2026.

data.title: Krispy Kreme Advances Turnaround to Drive Capital-Light Growth Through Refranchising
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina-based Krispy Kreme, Inc. (NASDAQ: DNUT) released updates on its efforts to improve financial health and spur growth by selling off franchise rights, a pivotal aspect of the strategy. WKS Restaurant Group recently boosted its ownership in the Western U.S. joint venture with Krispy Kreme. The move, finalized on March 23, 2026, marks a significant development in the ongoing initiative to optimize the balance sheet and enhance profitability.

data.title: Nasdaq Announces Mid-Month Open Short Interest Positions in Nasdaq Stocks as of Settlement Date March 13, 2026
data.description: In New York on March 24, 2026, the short interest in 3,657 Nasdaq Global Market SM securities on March 13, 2026, amounted to 16,179,628,406 shares. This was an increase from 15,794,218,322 shares in 3,629 Global Market issues on February 27, 2026. The short interest period in mid-March was 2.42 days, down from 2.64 days in the previous reporting period.

data.title: AirJoule Technologies Schedules Release of Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results and Conference Call
data.description: In Ronan, Montana, on March 24, 2026, AirJoule Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: AIRJ) revealed plans to disclose its complete financial outcomes for the year 2025 post-market closure on Monday, March 30, 2026. The announcement entails a conference call and Q&A session with the management team to evaluate the findings at 8:30 AM ET on Tuesday, March 31, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Will Be Bank Commodities Within 5 Years, Crypto Finance CEO Says
data.description: In the next five years, Bitcoin and Ethereum are expected to be offered as commodities by any bank, according to CEO Stijn Van Straten of Crypto Finance. Van Straten's Commodity Thesis suggests that established tokens like Bitcoin and Ethereum will be considered standard commodities within the financial industry, while newer DeFi protocols may take another 5-10 years for regulatory acceptance. Van Straten anticipates that Bitcoin and Ethereum will be purchasable through any bank within the next five years. Major traditional institutions are cautious about entering the cryptocurrency space due to regulatory uncertainties, opting to wait for clearer guidelines. On the other hand, crypto-native platforms have already... (The rest of the information can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Cardlytics Completes Sale of Bridg Assets to PAR Technology
data.description: A digital advertising platform, Cardlytics, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDLX), based in Atlanta, has finalized the sale of its Bridg business to PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR). In this deal, Cardlytics is set to receive 1,810,222 shares of PAR Technology common stock. Amit Gupta, CEO of Cardlytics, stated that this transaction signifies a significant achievement for the company.

data.title: Nasdaq Doubles Down On Crypto Push With Talos Partnership (CORRECTED)
data.description: This article has been updated to clarify that Nasdaq Inc (NASDAQ: NDAQ) is enhancing its crypto strategy by teaming up with Talos, a provider of institutional digital-asset infrastructure. The partnership aims to integrate crypto trading and risk management into traditional financial systems. This collaboration will link Talos' crypto trading and risk tools with Nasdaq's Calypso platform, allowing institutions to handle digital assets alongside stocks and bonds within their current workflows. For more details, consult the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: YY Group (NASDAQ: YYGH) Appoints Arros AI Co-Founder Kai Yang as Chief AI Scientist to Accelerate AI-Powered Workforce Platform Development
data.description: The recent hire strengthens the organization's AI strengths as it progresses towards its revenue goals of $103 million to $110 million for the fiscal year 2026. With headquarters in Singapore, YY Group Holding Limited (NASDAQ: YYGH) is a prominent player in the on-demand workforce sector.

data.title: KB HOME REPORTS 2026 FIRST QUARTER RESULTS
data.description: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) announced its financial results for the first quarter ending on February 28, 2026. The company reported revenues of $1.08 billion and a diluted earnings per share of $.52. In addition, KB Home repurchased $50.0 million worth of common stock during this period. The company expressed satisfaction with the steady flow of visitors to their communities.
